mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stats_link ( preview_key, provider_id, canonical_url, title, site_name, first_seen_at, last_seen_at ) VALUES ( #{previewKey}, #{providerId}, #{canonicalUrl}, #{title}, #{siteName}, #{firstSeenAt}, #{lastSeenAt} ) ON CONFLICT(preview_key) DO UPDATE SET provider_id = COALESCE(excluded.provider_id, stats_link.provider_id), canonical_url = COALESCE(NULLIF(excluded.canonical_url, ''), stats_link.canonical_url), title = CASE WHEN excluded.title IS NOT NULL AND excluded.title != '' THEN excluded.title ELSE stats_link.title END, site_name = CASE WHEN excluded.site_name IS NOT NULL AND excluded.site_name != '' THEN excluded.site_name ELSE stats_link.site_name END, first_seen_at = MIN(stats_link.first_seen_at, excluded.first_seen_at), last_seen_at = MAX(stats_link.last_seen_at, excluded.last_seen_at)
